---
title: "Shiny App Guide"
---

## Application Structure

The app follows a modular structure:

1. `app/app.R` - top-level layout and module wiring.
2. `app/R/data_utils.R` - dataset loading and preprocessing helpers.
3. `app/R/mod_cluster_ui.R` - cluster module UI.
4. `app/R/mod_cluster_server.R` - cluster module logic.

## Run Commands

```bash
Rscript run_app.R 3838
```

## What to Expect

Current module available in app:

1. Cluster analysis prototype
2. Adjustable `k`, period filter, and seed
3. Scatter plot + profile table + silhouette score

## One-Click Dev Start (PowerShell)

```powershell
powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/start-dev.ps1
```

## Data Source

App reads:

`data/raw/tourism_four_part_analysis_ready.xlsx`
